Clinical Profile

Miss Han Bin Lee

Consultant Ophthalmologist
Advancing surgical excellence through digital integration and precision patient care.

Miss Han Bin Lee is a UK-trained Consultant Ophthalmic Surgeon specialising in advanced cataract removal and corneal conditions. A graduate of University College Londoon and a Fellow of the Royal College of Ophthalmologists (FRCOphth), she brings ssub-specialist fellowship training from the renowned Corneoplastic Unit of Queen Victoria Hospital and Frimley Park Hospital to her practice. By utilisaing state-of-the-art diagnostic imaging and high-precision micro-incision surgical technology, her practice is dedicatred to achieving the highest standard of visual outcomes. Every procedure is delivered within a calm, reassuring and patient-focussed environment. Committed to shaping the future of her specialty, Miss Lee serves as a surgical trainer and clinical supervisor, actively mentoring and training the next generation of ophthalmic surgeons.

Miss Lee holds holds substantive consultant posts at Frimley Health NHS Foundation Trust. Her private practice operates across Parkside Frimley Park, Heatherwood Hospital, and Benenden Hospital, where she remains dedicated to delivering exceptional, patient-centred eye care.

Cataract surgery Corneal conditions Dry eye management YAG laser capsulotomy
Specialties
Complex Cataract surgery · Corneal conditions · Dry eye · YAG laser · Premium lenses
NHS base
Frimley Health NHS Foundation Trust
Private practice
Frimley, Parkside Hospital · Heatherwood, Parkside Hospital · Benenden Hospital
Qualifications
MBBS, University College London (2012), BSci, FRCOphth, CertLRS
Fellowships
Corneoplastic Unit, Queen Victoria Hospital · Frimley Park Hospital
Academic
Former Honorary Clinical Lecturer, Brighton & Sussex Medical School
Han Bin Lee

Consultant Ophthalmologist specialising in cataract surgery and complex corneal conditions across NHS and private practice.
